# render-diff

Diff renderer for the registrations facet in the PR review pane. Contributes a
`DiffRenderer` that projects each plugin's runtime registrations to one
`runtime: factory('label')` string per registration (via
`registrationsToComparable` in the facet `core/`), mirroring `renderDoc`, so
the host can diff a plugin's registrations between the worktree and main. No
legacy `registrationStrings()` existed — this defines the registrations diff.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Diff renderer for the registrations facet (PR review).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginChanges.DiffRenderer` "Registrations"
  - Uses: `review/plugin-changes.PluginChangesSlots`
